strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems engineering background, including building event-driven platforms and microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Relevant domain exposure with a recent role building AI-agent infrastructure and prior experience in the fintech sector at RIDE Capital.
Demonstrated architectural initiative and entrepreneurial drive as the founder and lead developer of an open-source, event-driven platform (GISCollective).
concerns: Lacks the required 5+ years of executive-level technical leadership and has no demonstrated track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people.

Agentic AI experience appears limited to a recent 6-month stint focused on developer tooling, lacking the required deep production experience with multi-agent systems in high-stakes commercial environments.
No evidence of managing complex fintech infrastructure integrations (e.g., real-time credit risk, algorithmic capital allocation) or handling board-level technical roadmap communications.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled and versatile Staff Software Engineer with strong backend, distributed systems, and open-source credentials. However, he falls significantly short of the executive requirements for this CTO role. He lacks the necessary senior technical leadership experience, the background in scaling engineering teams, and the deep production expertise in applying multi-agent AI architectures to high-stakes fintech environments. While his recent exposure to AI tooling and past fintech experience are positive, his profile aligns with a hands-on senior individual contributor rather than an executive technology leader.
